reviews.review_msg: Robin is honestly one of the most caring profs I've met and sets a standard for me as a educator. She worked with our master's cohort to create a safe space and really intentionally structured the course so that it eased us back into academia. We  were able to tackle difficult subjects with her care and guidance. Very approachable and helpful.

Honestly, a fairly easy class. Shes incredibly intelligent, but a little bit of a dull course. You get very, very little feedback on your work. If youre picking something for an elective in you MEd, keep that in mind.
